---
title: "Random Stokes Wave"
format: 
  html:
    # 注入 CSS 和 JS
    include-after-body: 
      - text: |
          <script type="module" src="../../_includes/fluid.js"></script>
    css: ../../styles.css
# 确保开启了 banner
title-block-banner: true 
---

::: {#module style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none;"}
:::

这是你的文章内容...
